step_rationale: Antioxidant enzyme; protects against ischemic injury and lipid oxidation.
mechanism: GPX3 mitigates oxidative stress during myocardial ischemia and lipoprotein oxidation.

references.title: Integrated transcriptomic and proteomic analysis reveals potential targets for heart regeneration.
Transcriptomic Profiling Unravels Novel Deregulated Gene Signatures Associated with Acute Myocardial Infarction: A Bioinformatics Approach.
